instruction: Rewrite the description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.
input: A stack-based buffer overflow in Fortinet FortiWeb versions 7.2.0 through 7.2.7, and 7.4.0 through 7.4.1 may allow a privileged user to execute arbitrary code via specially crafted CLI commands, provided the user is able to evade FortiWeb stack protections.
output: Fortinet FortiWeb versions 7.2.0 to 7.2.7 and 7.4.0 to 7.4.1 are affected by a stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability. This flaw could enable a privileged user to execute arbitrary code through crafted CLI commands if they bypass the built-in stack protections.
